title: 4pc Shopkins Stretchy Silicone Bracelets Gift Set D'Lish Donut Apple Blossom
description:
Accessorize any outfit with the 4pc Shopkins Silicone Bracelet Set! This set comes with 4 different colored bracelets, each featuring a different Shopkins character: Kooky Cookies, D'Lish Donut, Apple Blossom and Strawberry Kiss. The bracelets are made of stretchy silicone so they are safe for kids, and each bracelet is about 3" so they'll fit most wrists. This fun jewelry set makes a great party favor or stocking stuffer for young girls and Shopkins collectors!
